Case study

Ethnic Story AI Gen

A premium cultural-tech platform that needed a website that educates, converts, and supports an AI-powered content experience.

Built a conversion-first narrative site that turns curiosity into inquiries.
Added AI-assisted discovery flows that make complex offerings feel effortless.
Delivered an operational admin portal for managing content, users, and campaigns.

Launch-ready experience

Fast, elegant storytelling with clear CTA architecture.

AI-powered search

Smart discovery for rich cultural and educational content.

Secure admin portal

Role-based tools for content teams and operators.

Scalable deployment

Cloud-first approach designed for future growth.

Services

Built for ambitious digital growth.

Custom websites

Premium marketing sites with conversion-focused UX and editorial storytelling.

E-commerce

Fast, high-conversion storefronts designed to scale from launch to global growth.

AI features

Smart assistants, content copilots, recommendation engines, and search experiences.

Secure admin portals

Role-based dashboards for teams to manage content, orders, and operations safely.

Automations

Workflow automations that cut repetitive manual tasks across your business.

Scalable deployments

Cloud-first architecture with performance monitoring and reliable releases.

Customer-facing features

Designed to feel premium and convert.

  • Immersive storytelling that feels like your brand.
  • CMS and content workflows made for creative teams.
  • Secure authentication, role controls, and audit-friendly systems.
  • Analytics-ready architecture for real growth measurement.

Admin portal features

Powerful behind-the-scenes control.

  • Role-based access for admins, staff, and partners.
  • Operational dashboards for orders, leads, and content health.
  • Approval pipelines for launches, content, and actions.
  • API integrations with CRM, ERP, and marketing stacks.

Industries served

Built to fit cultural, commerce, and innovation brands.

Arts & cultureEducation & researchRetail & lifestyleHealth & wellnessSaaS & B2B services

Build process

  1. 01Discover the business outcome and brand story.
  2. 02Design the experience with clear conversion paths.
  3. 03Build with clean architecture and modular integrations.
  4. 04Launch, optimize, and scale with confidence.
